llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 10.2 (Multi-Use Building Transfer Switch Installation Proposal) was pulled from the consent agenda. Item 10.5 (Fiber Upgrades Proposal) contractor name was corrected from 'Vanden Bos' to 'Van den Bos' but item remained on agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I have a motion to move the consent items, the regular ones? So moved. Second. All in favor? Aye.

items.intro_words: Okay, so we're going to reconvene from our closed session. Eliana. Roll call.
Trustee McAvoy. Present. Trustee Walz. Here. Trustee Lawson.

The Redwood City School District Mental Health Program and Stanford University Collaborative.

And we have one action item for the bond as well. 11.1,

Okay, now to the consent items. Can I have a motion? Oh,

See, 13.2 is the recommendation of approval of management consultant agreement
